'''âf-t-zh-n''' ('''kafatzhenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waddle|waddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-t-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waddle|waddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-t-zh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kafatzhenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifatzhenoko|thifatzhenoko]] || [[word:jifatzhenoko|jifatzhenoko]] || [[word:shifatzhenoko|shifatzhenoko]] || [[word:kifatzhenoko|kifatzhenoko]]
|-
